description: Hillside Family Medicine is conducting a diabetes quality improvement audit. Your panel includes patients with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (ICD-10: E11.9). Diabetes care guidelines require that all diabetic patients remain current on recommended preventive care, including vaccinations and regular clinical follow-up. Audit each diabetic patient's records and identify those with outstanding preventive care gaps. For each patient with unmet care requirements, record any missing vaccines and create an encounter note documenting the diabetes care gap review. Ensure that patients already meeting all recommended care targets do not receive duplicate entries. Credentials: admin / Admin1234!, practice: Hillside Family Medicine.
